d1_prob.source: Out-of-fold predictions from catcher D1 model (CalibratedClassifierCV, isotonic, cv=3)
d1_prob.generation: cross_val_predict with StratifiedKFold(n_splits=5) on full catcher dataset (D1 + Non-D1)
d1_prob.note: Leak-free OOF probabilities — each player's d1_prob was predicted by a model that never saw that player in training
